name: Serve IoT MQTT Panel config files
Serve IoT MQTT Panel config files

rules.to: (	   msg.payload.black = "on" or msg.payload.fresh = "on" or msg.payload.gray = "on" or msg.payload.gray2 = "on"	) ? "on" : "off"

name: All tank heaters indicator on if ANY heater is on
Set waterpump on with light state

rules.to: (	   (payload.connected = "online"  or payload.connected = "true") and payload.bridge_online = "online" and payload.entered = 0	) ? 255 : "false"

name: Get Engine RPMs from AST;
startup gate
Build HA discovery config
